prompt: Generate an asteroid belt in a galaxy, using the asteroid from the image as the repeating component
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of an expansive, dense asteroid belt. The individual asteroids within the belt should visually replicate the elongated, light-grey, pockmarked asteroid shown in image 1. The entire asteroid belt is situated within and illuminated by a detailed, distant galaxy, serving as the cosmic backdrop.
objects: Illumination on the asteroid belt from the galaxy
